scenario: User explicit mode override takes precedence over auto-selection
title: Explicit 'Standard' keyword overrides auto-selection logic
user_request: Standard research: compare Redis vs Valkey for our caching layer
decision_rationale: User specified 'Standard' explicitly. Auto-selection would evaluate the comparison and might choose Deep, but the explicit override pins it to Standard (15-25 calls).
coverage_rules: user explicitly requests a specific mode
